name: taskflow-pro
description: TaskFlow Pro is a production-ready, full-stack SaaS application designed for high-performance teams. Built with a modern tech stack, it features a sleek Kanban board, role-based access control, and real-time analytics.

scripts.build: npm install --prefix client && npm run build --prefix client
scripts.install-all: npm install && npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
